title: 7NEWS Archive: Woman arrested for not paying seatbelt fine
description: In 1977, a woman was physically arrested from her Adelaide home after refusing to pay a fine for not wearing her seatbelt. Verna Oakley argued that she had a "right to decide" whether or not to wear a seatbelt.   Seatbelts became compulsory for drivers and front-seat passengers in South Australia in 1971. #seatbelt #driving #arrest #archive #history #SouthAustralia

title: Judge scolds woman for joining virtual court hearing while driving
